productFP.statement: Measure volumetric flow rate and fluid temperature in closed-pipe liquid circuits without mechanical contact, pressure drop, or moving parts
productFP.object: volumetric flow rate and fluid temperature
differentiators: No mechanical contact with the fluid stream
Zero pressure drop across the measurement point
No moving parts — eliminates mechanical wear and maintenance
Simultaneous flow + temperature in a single sensor body
Bidirectional flow detection without additional hardware
Tolerant of glycol mixtures and particulate suspensions

commodityFP.statement: Quantify the volumetric or mass flow rate of fluids traversing a closed conduit
commodityFP.reasoning: All flowmeter technologies (ultrasonic, Coriolis, electromagnetic, turbine, vortex, orifice-plate, thermal, differential-pressure) share this fundamental function. Differences are in mechanism, accuracy, media compatibility, and installation constraints — not in function. [SRC: 01_product_decomposition]
commodityFP.fpExtension: The underlying transit-time ultrasonic principle also enables: (1) liquid concentration measurement — glycol percentage detection via speed-of-sound shifts; (2) medium anomaly detection — air bubble presence, empty-pipe conditions; (3) fluid temperature monitoring — via integrated thermistor. These cross into UNSPSC classes 41115600 (Liquid analyzers) and 41112201 (Temperature sensors). [ASM: derived from feature set in 01_product_decomposition]

bomPosition.parentSubsystem: Hydronic circuit, cooling loop, heating circuit, process-fluid loop
bomPosition.grandparentSystem: HVAC system, heat pump, boiler, industrial process skid, beverage dispenser

complements.name: Fluid conduit / piping
complements.description: Inline pipe of matching diameter (DN12-DN25) for sensor installation

complements.name: System controller
complements.description: Microcontroller, PLC, or BMS to read sensor output (UART/LIN/frequency) and act on data

complements.name: DC power supply
complements.description: 5V or 6-30V DC depending on variant; battery mode available at <5 uA

complements.name: Straight pipe run (upstream)
complements.description: 5-10x DN of undisturbed straight pipe upstream for specified accuracy

complements.name: De-aerator
complements.description: Required in systems with chronic air entrainment >2% vol for reliable measurement

complements.name: Commissioning / fluid-type configuration
complements.description: Fluid type must be configured at commissioning for accurate compensation algorithms

complements.name: Data logging / visualization
complements.description: SCADA, HMI, or cloud dashboard for measurement trend storage and display
